data.title: Bad Data is Costing Businesses Customers and the Numbers Prove It
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Data Axle has found that inaccurate business listings are causing a decline in customer engagement. The study highlighted that inconsistency in online business information is leading to a loss of potential customers. With AI technology becoming increasingly prevalent in online searches, the stakes are higher for businesses to ensure accurate and up-to-date information. The study emphasized the importance of addressing this issue promptly, as the survey reported that approximately 45% of consumers have been deterred from engaging with a business due to inaccurate online listings. This trend poses a significant challenge for businesses in maintaining customer trust and attracting new clientele. The survey was conducted in Dallas on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Exchange Solutions Puts a Data Scientist in Every Loyalty Marketer's Hands
data.description: In Toronto today, Exchange Solutions Inc., a prominent loyalty and promotions technology provider for North American retailers, unveiled Member Scoring & Intelligence (MSI). This AI analytics agent allows loyalty marketers to effortlessly choose, set up, and implement customer scores through natural conversation, eliminating the need for data analysts, queues, or long waiting periods. Operating on Amazon Web Services (AWS), MSI grants access to functions previously exclusive to enterprise data science units, streamlining the process for businesses.

data.title: o9 Selected by Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group to Optimize Data-Driven Retail Planning
data.description: A software company, o9, has partnered with Chow Tai Fook Jewellery Group to improve its retail planning capabilities. o9, known for its AI-powered Digital Brain platform, caters to over 30 industry verticals. Chow Tai Fook, a renowned Chinese luxury brand established in 1929, runs 5000+ stores in China and expanding its global presence. This partnership aims to enhance Chow Tai Fook's end-to-end retail planning using innovative technology.

data.title: Homebuyers Hold the Negotiating Power In 38 Major Metros, Up From 29 Last Year
data.description: In March, 38 out of the 50 most populous metropolitan areas in the U.S. were classified as buyer's markets, which marked an increase from 29 cities compared to the previous year. Only five cities were labeled as seller's markets, a decrease from nine in 2025. The analysis was conducted by Redfin, a real estate brokerage affiliated with Rocket. The criteria for categorizing markets were based on there being over 10% more sellers than buyers, defining it as a buyer's market. The study included data from 49 metro areas with adequate information for analysis.

data.title: Treasure Data® Becomes Treasure AI™, Delivering 10x Value to Marketers in 10 Minutes with Its Agentic Experience Platform
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Treasure AI has unveiled a significant update to its brand and platform, aiming to serve as an agentic experience platform for brands seeking to effectively engage with their top customers round the clock. The company emphasizes the combination of AI technology with human touch and creativity to enhance customer engagement, retention, and overall growth. Treasure AI offers a solution for marketing and data teams to drive customer experiences on a large scale, with a focus on smarter strategies and measurable outcomes.

data.title: Biorem Reports Record Revenues and Earnings before tax for 2025
data.description: Earnings for BIOREM Inc. (TSXV: BRM) showed a significant increase of 60% over the previous year, with revenue reaching $42,355 for the twelve-month period ending on December 31, 2025, compared to $37,419 in 2024. Gross profit also saw a notable rise to $12,767 from $10,056 in the same period. The financial highlights for the three-month period ending December 31, 2025, include revenue of $16,941 compared to $9,316 in 2024, and a gross profit of $5,942 versus $1,598 in the previous year. Operating expenses were reported at $2,212. The company's complete fiscal 2025 year-end financial statements and MD&A have been submitted on SEDAR. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
SOURCE ROCK ROYALTIES ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER & YEAR-END 2025 RESULTS

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From GE Aerospace Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: On Tuesday, April 21, GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) will announce its first quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $1.60 per share, a rise from $1.49 per share in the same period last year. The estimated quarterly revenue for GE Aerospace stands at $10.72 billion, up from the previous year's $9 billion. Citigroup analyst John Godyn upheld a Buy rating on GE Aerospace and adjusted the price target to $353 from $380 on April 2. The company's current annual dividend yield is 0.62%, with a quarterly dividend of 47 cents per share ($1.88 per year). Investors are considering potential gains from dividends amidst the recent attention surrounding GE Aerospace.

data.title: Fairbanks Morse Defense’s All-Electric Davit by Welin Lambie Achieves First Article Test Milestone for US Coast Guard Offshore Patrol Cutter Program
data.description: In Beloit, Wisconsin, Welin Lambie, a subsidiary of Fairbanks Morse Defense (FMD), revealed that their TWPIV 5.0E all-electric, dual-point davit system has passed the First Article Test for the U.S. Coast Guard’s Offshore Patrol Cutter (OPC) Stage 2 initiative. This milestone demonstrates that the system meets the OPC Stage 2 criteria for efficiently launching and retrieving small boats in challenging sea environments. The TWPIV 5.0E is engineered for superior performance and reliability during maritime operations.

data.title: Leonardo DRS Launches New Maritime Counter-UAS Capability to Defeat Aerial Unmanned Threats at Sea
data.description: Leonardo DRS, Inc. revealed that it has effectively incorporated its Maritime Mission Equipment Package (M-MEP) onto an autonomous unmanned surface vessel (AUSV), introducing a fresh counter-unmanned aerial system (C-UAS) feature aimed at identifying and neutralizing aerial unmanned threats in the maritime area. The integration is designed to offer a fast and seamless integration on both manned and unmanned platforms, delivering a ready-to-use defense layer. Leonard DRS, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as DRS, shared the news without disclosing further details.

data.title: Saildrone Unveils Spectre, a New Class of High-Speed Unmanned Surface Vessel for Naval Operations
data.description: A new military vessel called Spectre, showcased at National Harbor, Maryland, is specifically crafted for continuous anti-submarine warfare, ISR, and strike missions. This cutting-edge design aims to bolster national defense capabilities, equipped to operate persistently in various maritime scenarios. The Spectre is engineered with advanced technology and weaponry, highlighting the country's commitment to security and combat readiness.

data.title: Maxell Establishes Corporate Byline “Micro batteries. Maximum impact.”
data.description: In Tokyo, Maxell has introduced its new corporate byline "Micro batteries. Maximum impact." as part of its efforts to emphasize its business-to-business (BtoB) value and enhance its corporate image worldwide. This move aims to strengthen Maxell's presence in the global market.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Announces $15 Million Registered Direct Offering of Common Stock And New $15 Million Asset-Backed Loan
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. disclosed today that it has engaged in a securities purchase agreement with specific institutional investors, primarily led by its Co-Founder. The agreement entails the acquisition and liquidation of 13,318,181 common shares at a rate of $1.10 per share in a registered direct offering. Furthermore, the Company's directors and officers are set to conduct separate transactions.

data.title: Bitcoin Tested $78,000 Resistance On $996M ETF Week: Breakout Coming This Week?
data.description: Last week saw Bitcoin spot ETFs receive a substantial $996.4 million in net inflows, marking the highest weekly total since mid-January and making it three consecutive weeks of positive flows. BlackRock's IBIT experienced the highest weekly inflows of $906 million, while Morgan Stanley's MSBT brought in $71 million in its first full trading week since launching on April 8. The two funds collectively amassed over $1.8 billion in the past three weeks. On the other hand, Ethereum spot ETFs also saw a surge in weekly net inflows, reaching $275.8 million, the highest since January 16. Institutional investors are optimistic about a lasting peace between the U.S. and Iran, contributing to this positive trend.

data.title: Four Seasons Resort Palm Beach Appoints Mark Bingle as General Manager
data.description: The newly appointed General Manager at Four Seasons Resort Palm Beach, Mark Bingle, brings close to thirty years of global experience with the renowned luxury hospitality brand. The announcement was made in Palm Beach, Florida on April 20, 2026. Bingle's extensive background with Four Seasons signifies a strategic move for the prestigious resort.

data.title: Simulations Plus Expands Global Access to Model-Informed Drug Development Training Through Its 2026 Spring School
data.description: Simulations Plus, Inc. (Nasdaq: SLP), a prominent player in model-informed and AI-driven drug development, has wrapped up its 2026 Spring School program. This global training effort aims to enhance the field of model-informed drug development (MIDD) and fortify the knowledge base of the industry's upcoming professionals. Over 1,400 scientists participated in this initiative, which seeks to broaden the reach of MIDD practices and build a stronger talent pool for the biopharma sector.

data.title: Artelo Announces Peer-Reviewed Publication Supporting its FABP5 Inhibitor ART26.12 as a Novel Pain Treatment with a Potentially First-in-Class Profile
data.description: ART26.12 displayed encouraging potential as a pain treatment, highlighting its distinct characteristics. The upcoming multiple ascending dose study scheduled for this year will further evaluate its efficacy and safety.

data.title: RedCloud to Enter Live Deployment Phase as Combined Turkey and Saudi Joint Ventures Represent Up to $80 Million Revenue
data.description: Collaborative partnerships have solidified agreements worth up to $80 million in pivotal international trade routes, signifying a shift towards initial operational phases with a prominent distribution network in Turkey.
IRAN WILLING TO ATTEND SECOND ROUND OF TALKS WITH US, PAKISTAN OFFICIALS SAY: AP NEWS

data.title: Medtronic completes acquisition of CathWorks, expanding its leadership in transforming care for patients with cardiovascular disease
data.description: Medtronic plc, a leading healthcare technology company, has recently finalized its acquisition of CathWorks, based in GALWAY, Ireland. The CathWorks FFRangio® System is notable for its innovative drug-free and wire-free technology used for comprehensive physiological assessment. This move signifies Medtronic's commitment to advancing healthcare solutions. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies and is expected to enhance their offerings in the healthcare sector.
